dag_desc: Simplify .roadmap/ file topology: kill 7 dead/redundant entries (chain.jsonl, head-index.json, spec-origin.json, git-state.json, .cache/, mutations.jsonl, tasks/*.artifact), merge lineage onto heads/, fold origin into head.json, fold mutations into trail.jsonl, enforce IO boundary by killing chain.ts escape hatch. 4 root files + 2 dirs, down from 7 + 4.

tasks.desc: Init marker — current state: DAG complete, 547 tests passing, chain.jsonl empty, all topology targets identified.

Delete .roadmap/.cache/ (30 files, 112K, never read), .roadmap/git-state.json (never read), .roadmap/tasks/*.artifact.json (informational only). Remove all code that writes to these: writeNodeCache() in brief-cache.ts, git-state writes in checkpoint.ts/cli-envelope.ts, artifact writes in advance.ts. Remove imports of brief-cache.ts. Delete brief-cache.ts if it becomes empty.

validate.command: ! grep -r 'writeNodeCache\|brief-cache' src/ --include='*.ts' -l | grep -v node_modules | grep -v dist

tasks.desc: Delete .roadmap/head-index.json. Remove all code that reads or writes it: index-extractor.ts, lazy-graph-loader.ts head-index reads, dag-consolidator.ts head-index writes, chain.ts HEAD_INDEX_FILE constant and archiveHead() index writes. Delete index-extractor.ts if it becomes empty. Update any imports.

validate.command: ! grep -r 'head-index\|headIndex\|HEAD_INDEX' src/ --include='*.ts' | grep -v node_modules | grep -v dist

tasks.desc: Move lineage data onto archived DAGs. When archiveHead() archives head.json to heads/{dagId}.json, add a _lineage field: { iteration, predecessorId, completedAt, executionReport }. Update loadChainState() in runtime/context.ts to scan heads/*.json and read _lineage fields instead of chain.jsonl. Delete chain.jsonl constant and appendLink/loadChain/currentIteration functions from chain.ts. Keep archiveHead (rewritten) and parseExecutionReport (still needed). Update getRootIntent to read from heads/ _lineage chain.

validate.command: ! grep -r 'chain\.jsonl\|CHAIN_FILE' src/ --include='*.ts' | grep -v node_modules | grep -v dist

tasks.desc: Fix the 3 modules that bypass Context by calling loadChain(repoRoot) directly: (1) src/cli/orient.ts:122 — replace loadChain/currentIteration/getRootIntent with ctx.chain from loadContext, (2) src/lib/terminal-brief.ts:59 — make buildTerminalBrief take Context (or chain state) as parameter instead of calling loadChain, (3) src/lib/convergence/gap-trajectory.ts:140 — pass chain data in instead of calling loadChain. After this, no module outside runtime/context.ts touches chain data directly.

Fold spec-origin.json into head.json as _origin field. Update make.ts to write _origin onto the DAG object before saving head.json instead of writing separate spec-origin.json. Update runtime-gate.ts requireValidOrigin() to read _origin from head.json instead of spec-origin.json. Update origin-validator.ts similarly. Delete spec-origin.ts if it becomes just a type definition (fold type into protocol). Delete .roadmap/spec-origin.json file.

validate.command: ! grep -r 'spec-origin\.json' src/ --include='*.ts' | grep -v node_modules | grep -v dist

tasks.desc: Fold mutations.jsonl into trail.jsonl. Update dag-mutator.ts to append mutation events to trail.jsonl (via appendTrail in shared.ts) instead of writing to mutations.jsonl. Update dag.ts log subcommand to read mutation events from trail.jsonl by filtering op type. Delete mutations.jsonl file. Delete MUTATIONS_FILE constant.

validate.command: ! grep -r 'mutations\.jsonl\|MUTATIONS_FILE' src/ --include='*.ts' | grep -v node_modules | grep -v dist

tasks.desc: Merge .claude/CLAUDE.md (agent guide, 241 lines) into root CLAUDE.md (264 lines). Deduplicate overlapping sections (both describe CLI commands, file topology, session protocol). Remove documentation for killed files (chain.jsonl, head-index.json, spec-origin.json, git-state.json, .cache/, mutations.jsonl). Update file topology section to match new 4+2 layout. Target: single CLAUDE.md under 350 lines total.

Topology simplified: .roadmap/ has 4 root files (head.json, completed.json, trail.jsonl, enforcement.json) + 2 directories (heads/, .handoff/). Zero IO boundary bypasses. Single CLAUDE.md under 350 lines. All tests pass. Lineage lives on archived DAGs. Mutations flow through trail. Origin travels with head.
